project_address: Plot # 12, Road # 5A, Bashundhara R/A, Baridhara, Dhaka
description: Aurora Heights is a premium 14-storey residential tower located in the prestigious Bashundhara R/A, Baridhara. Offering panoramic city views, modern interiors, and world-class amenities including a rooftop garden, gym, and swimming pool.

Skyline Plaza is a landmark Grade-A commercial tower in Gulshan-2 featuring premium office spaces, conference facilities, and ground-floor retail. Designed for global corporations and leading local businesses demanding the highest standard of workspace.

Crystal Cove is a boutique low-rise residential building in Uttara Sector-7, offering spacious family apartments with landscaped surroundings, top-tier security, and easy access to schools and shopping centres.

project_address: Plot # 33, Tejgaon Industrial Area, Tejgaon, Dhaka
description: Nexus Tower is Dhaka's most ambitious mixed-use development — combining luxury residences on upper floors, Grade-A offices on mid-floors, and a vibrant retail podium at ground level. A self-contained vertical community in the heart of Tejgaon.

project_address: Sector # 11, Block-D, Purbachal New Town, Dhaka
description: Verdant Villas offers exclusive stand-alone villas in the serene Purbachal New Town — each home surrounded by lush greenery, private pools, and large gardens. Ideal for families seeking privacy and space far from the urban rush.

Pearl Residency is an ultra-luxury boutique apartment building in the heart of Dhanmondi, offering only two apartments per floor to ensure absolute privacy. Each unit is crafted with premium materials and bespoke interiors.

Metro Hub is a modern 8-storey shopping and lifestyle complex in Badda, designed to serve eastern Dhaka's rapidly growing population. With 200+ retail spaces, a multiplex, food court, supermarket anchor, and ample parking, it redefines retail convenience.

project_address: Plot # 2, Kemal Ataturk Avenue, Banani, Dhaka
description: Indigo Suites is a five-star hotel investment opportunity in the upscale Banani corridor. Investors can own individual hotel units managed under the Zenith Hospitality brand, earning guaranteed rental yields with full property management included.

TechPark One is a state-of-the-art multi-storey industrial and warehouse complex in Gazipur, Bangladesh's industrial heartland. Built for light manufacturing, logistics, and warehousing tenants seeking modern, compliant facilities close to Dhaka.

Harbour View is a stunning seafront mixed-use tower in Agrabad, Chittagong — capturing panoramic views of the Bay of Bengal. The project blends luxury apartments, premium office floors, and a fine-dining restaurant podium into one iconic address.

Sylvan Greens is an eco-conscious residential development within the planned Jalshiri Abashon area. Designed with passive cooling, green rooftops, and energy-efficient systems, this project offers a sustainable urban lifestyle for forward-thinking families.

project_address: Plot # 45, Bir Uttam Mir Shawkat Sarak, DOHS Mirpur, Dhaka
description: Zen Office Park is a contemporary low-density office campus in DOHS Mirpur, offering mid-size corporate tenants a calm, campus-style work environment with abundant natural light, greenery, and top-tier infrastructure.

Lotus Square is a completed and handed-over boutique residential project in Kalabagan. All units were delivered on time with premium finishings, and the building is fully occupied by its proud owners.

project_address: House # 9, Road # 3, Block-F, Rayer Bazar, Dhaka
description: Copper Lane is a completed residential project in Rayer Bazar. All 16 units have been handed over. The building features a classic facade with modern interiors and is now a fully established residential community.
Amber Court is a fully completed and handed-over residential building in Adabor, Dhaka. All units were successfully delivered to their owners.
Sunrise Enclave is a completed mid-rise residential building in Shyamoli with quality construction and functional floor plans that continue to be appreciated by its residents.

Blue Horizon Tower is an upcoming premium residential project in Khilkhet, designed to the highest international standards. Pre-launch registration is open for early buyers who will benefit from special introductory pricing.

Emerald Commerce Centre is Zenith's most ambitious upcoming commercial project — a 30-storey landmark tower in Dhaka's central business district of Motijheel. Designed for banking, finance, and multinational corporations seeking a prestigious address in Bangladesh's financial capital.
